queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and decreased credit risk probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the impact of negative checking account balances on the reduction of credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Statistical assessment of how employment duration of less than one year contributes to increased credit default likelihood.
